text:
There once was a frog who lived near a crystal-clear pond. Every day he would go there, hop around in the bright sunlight, eat some tasty insects, chase after princesses (well, maybe just one), and enjoy the serenade of birds.

One day, the frog heard a strange noise coming from the pond. Glistening lights began floating around—it was a new kind of creature! These lantern fish twinkled brilliantly, floating with grace. They seemed harmless at first glance.

The frog thought, "Maybe they just want some water?"

So he approached one, who flickered a welcoming light. "Hello there," the frog said. "You look pretty bright. Want to join me by the pond?"

The lantern fish smiled gently. "You have a lovely voice," it replied. It began singing a cheerful tune. The frog joined in, their voices weaving a melodious tale about friendship and shimmering lights.

Soon other lantern fish joined them, each telling their own delightful story. They
